name: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP
summary: Greystone Housing Impact Investors LP is a limited partnership that invests in mortgage revenue bonds (MRBs), governmental issuer loans (GILs), and other financing instruments supporting affordable multifamily housing across the United States. The Partnership also holds equity investments in multifamily properties, participates in tax-exempt bond securitization (TEBS) financings with Freddie Mac, and manages a construction lending joint venture with BlackRock Impact Opportunities to finance affordable housing development.

products.name: Mortgage Revenue Bonds (MRBs)
products.description: Tax-exempt bonds financing affordable multifamily housing properties, securitized through TEBS and PFA transactions.

products.name: Governmental Issuer Loans (GILs)
products.description: Loans issued to governmental entities to finance affordable multifamily housing.

products.name: TEBS Financings
products.description: Tax Exempt Bond Securitization financings with Freddie Mac, issuing Class A and Class B certificates.

products.name: Construction Lending JV
products.description: Joint venture with BlackRock Impact Opportunities financing construction and rehabilitation of affordable multifamily housing.

products.name: JV Equity Investments
products.description: Noncontrolling equity investments in unconsolidated entities for development of market rate multifamily properties.

products.name: C-PACE Financing
products.description: Commercial Property Assessed Clean Energy financing product offered by the Partnership.

partnerships.description: TEBS and TEL financing arrangements; Class A certificates credit-enhanced by Freddie Mac.
